channel.title: Fintech on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Fintech on Junho Lee

item.title: Toss Securities Launches Open API for Automated Trading
item.description: Toss Securities introduces an Open API service featuring REST APIs, WebSockets, and LLM integration to lower the barrier for retail system trading.

item.title: How a Fintech Giant Rebuilds as an AI-Native Organization
item.description: A global financial tech firm reduces headcount by 40% and replaces management hierarchies with an AI intelligence layer to build a flat, data-driven organization.
